evals.prompt: 帮我看下这篇长上下文 Transformer 的论文值不值得精读。
evals.expected_output: Enters quick-screen mode: core question, novelty, evidence strength, main risks, and a read/skip recommendation.
assertions: Announces quick-screen mode at the start
Does not conclude from the abstract alone; flags provisional judgment if only the abstract is available
Tries Zotero first, then web fallback, to get full text

evals.prompt: 带我逐图读这篇扩散模型的论文，像导师一样讲。
evals.expected_output: Enters mentor deep-read mode: narrative-type call, pre-reading checks, overview, then per-figure reading that stops after each figure.
assertions: Completes narrative-type judgment, 3-item pre-check, and overview before per-figure reading
Stops after each figure and waits for the user
Checks information sufficiency and offers to request an image when legend/text is thin

evals.prompt: 批判分析这篇 RLHF 论文，找问题并设计一个 follow-up。
evals.expected_output: Enters research-review mode: core claim, evidence chain, most fragile assumption, one-week minimal reproduction, strongest counter-example, non-incremental follow-up.
assertions: Focuses on the single most fragile assumption, not an exhaustive limitation list
Proposes a minimal reproduction and a strongest counter-example
Follow-up is non-incremental (new framing, not 'extend to task X')

evals.prompt: 我手上有五篇相关 paper，帮我整合一下，顺便找研究空白。
evals.expected_output: Routing-negative: multi-paper synthesis and gap mapping should route to paper-workbench, not literature-mentor.
assertions: Does NOT start a single-paper tutor read
Defers to paper-workbench for cross-paper synthesis

evals.prompt: 把这批 arXiv 链接规范化成机器可读的 JSON。
evals.expected_output: Routing-negative: source normalization into machine-readable artifacts should route to paper-workbench.
assertions: Does NOT enter interactive tutor reading
